author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
The Crew Motorfest: Season 10 Launch Trailer
The hottest lineup of the summer is almost here

#TheCrewMotorfest Season 10, available tomorrow! 

About The Crew Motorfest:
Welcome to Motorfest! Discover the evergreen festival featuring the best experiences car culture has to offer. Complete your ultimate action driving bucket list through a series of tailor-made races, themed events, and other unique challenges. Explore the vibrant island of O’ahu in Hawaii alone or with your crew. Whatever the way you enjoy cars and driving, there is something in there for you!

#Ubisoft #TheCrew #TheCrewMotorfest 

Learn more about Ubisoft: www.ubisoftgroup.com

author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains | Launch Trailer
Step into the Star Wars galaxy with a bold new twist on Monopoly.
Available Now!

Discover how Monopoly evolves with a bold Star Wars twist, featuring team‑based play, character abilities, and dynamic board moments that can change the game with every roll.

#MonopolyStarWars


About Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains:
Get ready for a dynamic, team-based twist on Monopoly set in the Star Wars galaxy! Choose your favorite heroes or villains, use their unique powers, and battle with your friends and family across a custom Monopoly board for control of the galaxy.

#Ubisoft #MonopolyStarWars


Learn more about Ubisoft: www.ubisoftgroup.com
